stemHtml: Consider the streamline pattern around an aeroplane. Which of the following options is correct with regards to the general appearance of the streamlines?

options.a: The streamlines typically follow the direction of the lateral axis of the aeroplane and remain attached along the entire length of the aeroplane.
options.b: The streamlines typically follow the contours of the fuselage, but they will have a slight spanwise flow producing a lift-like force.
options.c: Around the entire aft section of the fuselage, the streamlines typically follow the corkscrew pattern of the wing tip vortices.
options.d: Across the entire wingspan of the main wings, the streamlines typically follow the corkscrew pattern of the wing tip vortices.
